items.title: Lindsey Vonn discharged, preparing to leave Italy after Olympics crash
items.description: The chief of the U.S. Ski Team says Lindsey Vonn is preparing to return to the United States a week after crashing in the Olympic downhill.

items.title: What's open and closed on Presidents Day 2026?
items.description: Most retail and food establishments will remain open, but services like mail delivery will be suspended for the federal holiday.
